meta.title: Furkan Tunalı CV
meta.description: Experienced software engineer architecting scalable, innovative solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across web development, full-stack. Currently working with AI to reimagine software functionality and create intelligent solutions.

projects.name: Newsify Today
projects.subtitle: AI news platform & ChatGPT App (MCP UI App)
projects.intro: Built and operate Newsify Today as both an AI news platform and an early ChatGPT App, tracking global web search trends across 16 regions and 12 languages and running an agentic AI pipeline to curate, score, and summarize news in real time.
bullets: Built a LangGraph-based agent with 9 tools (scrape, summarize, validate, score, deduplicate) that processes trends end‑to‑end with deterministic tool routing — no prompt-level orchestration, each step has explicit contracts.
Run self-hosted Ollama (Qwen) across 3 nodes with health-aware least-connections routing, tier-based fallback to Google Gemini, and in-flight slot tracking — keeping inference cost near zero.
Implemented a Model Context Protocol server with a trend-news tool, embedded React widget (OpenAI Apps SDK), and streamable HTTP transport — launched as an early ChatGPT App.
Run the entire stack on a 3-node Kubernetes on-premises cluster — API, web, scraper, database, Redis queues, Cloudflare Tunnel ingress — with automated CI/CD via GitHub Actions and rolling deploys.

Server-Sent Events pipeline streams AI-generated articles to a Next.js frontend in real time, with bridge-seeded first paint and fingerprint-based cache invalidation for instant updates without full re-generation.
Full observability with LangSmith, Grafana, Loki, Tempo, and Prometheus — logs, traces, and metrics from both server and browser, plus tracing for every AI agent run.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Python, NestJS, Next.js, React, LangGraph, LangChain, Ollama, Gemini API, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, MicroK8s, Docker, Cloudflare Tunnels, Grafana/Loki/Tempo, MCP SDK, Vite, Turborepo

subroles.title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
bullets: Integrated OpenAI and Tavily APIs to build an AI-powered system that analyzed customer input to identify GDPR-relevant vendors, automatically retrieving structured data such as hosting locations, DPO emails, and privacy policy links.
Researching about how to utilise AI Agent frameworks (PydanticAI, Autogen) to solve current challenges in the company.

subroles.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Created Kubernetes and Terraform from scratch for scalable infrastructure setup and reliable deployments.
Drafted technical implementation details to guide project development and ensure consistent coding standards across teams.
Led successful migration from ECS to Kubernetes (EKS), learning the technology from scratch and executing a smooth switchover with zero downtime.
Worked with AWS suite (Fargate, ECS, CloudFormation, ECR, RDS, Cloud Map, EC2, Route53, Lambda) to improve service deployment.
Supported infrastructure initiatives including Route53 configuration, domain management, and DMARC reporting setup for email delivery.
Addressed critical technical incidents and provided rapid resolution to maintain continuous service availability for customers.

subroles.title: Senior Developer Experience Engineer
bullets: Developed software solutions using JavaScript and TypeScript, with a focus on modern frameworks such as NestJS, NextJS, Rails, and VUE.
Migrated infrastructure from Heroku to AWS ECS.
Restructured legacy Ruby on Rails systems into a monorepo, Dockerized applications, and established reliable local development environments enabling efficient developer onboarding.
Built CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, integrated AWS ECR, and introduced Terraform to streamline environment provisioning across Testing and Production.
Implemented an event-driven scheduling system using AWS EventBridge to automate client reminders without building a custom solution.
Developed DevOps and DX tools, including Makefile and Bash scripts, to automate routine tasks and improve development workflow efficiency.
Maintained Docker Compose setups for service orchestration and environment consistency.
Mentored team members, offering structured and insightful feedback while serving as a trusted technical resource.
Contributed to the hiring process by evaluating candidates with deep expertise in design patterns, best practices, and JavaScript.
Established technical vision and drove adoption of architectural concepts aligned with enterprise requirements
Implemented cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines for secure, on-time product delivery
Optimized containerization strategies for AI/ML workloads and deployed complex models to Azure CUDA for accelerated performance
Integrated AI systems through Jupyter Notebooks while ensuring compatibility with parent company services
Enhanced developer experience through monorepo management, automated semantic versioning, and comprehensive testing strategies
Designed full-stack boilerplates for MVPs and facilitated data migrations for upcoming services
Led technical hiring, mentoring, and onboarding while implementing code quality standards through reviews and linting
